creator: dbaio@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 172509
py-phply-0.9.1_1.patch

- Only use Python up to 2.7 until it's confirmed to work with other versions.


portlint: OK
	looks fine.

testport: OK
	poudriere: i386,  10.1 (tested)
	poudriere: amd64, 10.1 (tested)

	poudriere: i386,  9.3  (tested)
	poudriere: amd64, 9.3  (tested)

	poudriere: i386,  11   (not tested, rebuilding my jail)
	poudriere: amd64, 11   (tested)
